name: @voluspalabs/icons
description: A collection of high-quality React SVG icons for modern web interfaces.
author: Voluspa <info@voluspa.io> (https://voluspa.io)

scripts.ci: bun run build && bun run site:build && bun run biome ci && bun run check-exports
scripts.check-exports: attw --pack . --entrypoints ./pi-github-stroke ./pi-npm-logo-symbol-stroke --ignore-rules=cjs-resolves-to-esm --profile esm-only && tsc --ignoreConfig --noEmit --module ESNext --moduleResolution bundler --target ESNext --jsx react-jsx --lib DOM,DOM.Iterable,ESNext --skipLibCheck scripts/smoke-types.ts
scripts.local-release: bun run ci && changeset version && changeset publish
